title: Outer Rim Flora
description: The outer layer of the island has Iceland-like sparse vegetation. Few trees exist, and those present are in hard-to-reach places or are big knotted deadwood. The player must work with this limited vegetation for resources like lumber and fuel.
definition-of-done: Outer rim biome renders with sparse, Iceland-like vegetation. Trees are rare and positioned in difficult locations. Deadwood serves as harvestable resource.
testing-plan: Verify outer rim vegetation density matches design. Test tree placement in challenging locations. Verify deadwood is harvestable.
